MatrixClientPeg.safeGet();\n\n    describe(\"eventTriggersUnreadCount()\", () => {\n        // setup events\n        const alicesMessage = new MatrixEvent({\n            type: EventType.RoomMessage,\n mocked(haveRendererForEvent).mockReturnValue(true);\n            expect(eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, alicesMessage)).toBe(true);\n            expect(haveRendererForEvent).toHaveBeenCalledWith(alicesMessage, client, false);\n        });\n\n        it(\"returns false for beacon locations\", () => {\n            const beaconLocationEvent = EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias,\n            EventType.RoomServerAcl,\n        ];\n\n        it.each(noUnreadEventTypes)(\n            \"returns false without checking for renderer for events with type {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019w9yKYdcPirmjMeZpCf6tr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/*\n     2→Copyright 2024 New Vector Ltd.\n     3→Copyright 2015-2023 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n     4→\n     5→SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\n     6→Please see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n     7→*/\n     8→\n     9→import { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\n    10→import { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n    11→\n    12→import shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\n    13→import { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\n    14→import { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n    15→\n    16→/**\n    17→ * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n    18→ * count of unread messages\n    19→ *\n    20→ * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n    21→ * @param {Object} ev The event\n    22→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n    23→ */\n    24→export function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    25→    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n    26→        return false;\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    switch (ev.getType()) {\n    30→        case EventType.RoomMember:\n    31→        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n    32→        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n    33→        case EventType.CallHangup:\n    34→        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n    35→        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n    36→        case M_BEACON.name:\n    37→        case M_BEACON.altName:\n    38→            return false;\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    42→    try {\n    43→        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    44→    } catch (e) {\n    45→        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n    46→        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    47→    }\n    48→}\n    49→\n    50→export function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    51→    const toCheck: Array<Room | Thread> = [room];\n    52→    if (includeThreads) {\n    53→        toCheck.push(...room.getThreads());\n    54→    }\n    55→\n    56→    for (const withTimeline of toCheck) {\n    57→        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline)) {\n    58→            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n    59→            return true;\n    60→        }\n    61→    }\n    62→\n    63→    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    64→    return false;\n    65→}\n    66→\n    67→function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): boolean {\n    68→    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    69→    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n    70→\n    71→    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    72→    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    73→    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n    74→        return !room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, latestImportantEventId);\n    75→    } else {\n    76→        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n    77→        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n    78→        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n    79→            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n    80→            // consider it read\n    81→            return false;\n    82→        } else if (room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId)) {\n    83→            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n    84→            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n    85→            return false;\n    86→        } else {\n    87→            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n    88→            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n    89→            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n    90→            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n    91→                roomId: room.roomId,\n    92→                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n    93→            });\n    94→            return true;\n    95→        }\n    96→    }\n    97→}\n    98→\n    99→/**\n   100→ * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n   101→ * @param room The room to check\n   102→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n   103→ */\n   104→export function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n   105→    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n   106→        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n   107→        // NB. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bb9fc71c-8640-4602-bdd0-cecb051b7494","uuid":"ea76517c-07da-4e48-b158-52e5112dab87","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/workspace/apps/web/src/Unread.ts","content":"/*\nCopyright 2024 New Vector Ltd.\nCopyright 2015-2023 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<Room | Thread> = [room];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        toCheck.push(...room.getThreads());\n    }\n\n    for (const withTimeline of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, latestImportantEventId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","numLines":151,"startLine":1,"totalLines":151}}}

doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<Room | Thread> = [room];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        toCheck.push(...room.getThreads());\n    }\n\n    for (const withTimeline of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, latestImportantEventId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":48,"oldLines":13,"newStart":48,"newLines":15,"lines":[" }"," "," export function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {","-    const toCheck: Array<Room | Thread> = [room];","+    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];","     if (includeThreads) {","-        toCheck.push(...room.getThreads());","+        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {","+            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);","+        }","     }"," ","-    for (const withTimeline of toCheck) {","-        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline)) {","+    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {","+        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {","             // We found an unread, so the room is unread","             return true;","         }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read. 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":66,"oldLines":14,"newStart":66,"newLines":14,"lines":["     return false;"," }"," ","-function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): boolean {","+function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {","     // The room is a space, let's ignore it","     if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;"," ","     const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();","     const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();","     if (latestImportantEventId) {","-        return !room.hasUserReadEvent(myUserId, latestImportantEventId);","+        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);","     } else {","         // We couldn't find an important event to check - {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01Mpu4NmRfKg2nhkaHYHX7ir","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WmoMctGcjjX1xoboWoYt4R","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/workspace/apps/web/src/Unread.ts","old_string":"export function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {","new_string":"/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);\n    if (!receiptsForEvent) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }\n    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {\n        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {\n            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {\n                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {\n                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;\n                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n                    if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                        // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                        if (receiptInfo.thread_id === threadId) {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                        // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n                        if (!receiptInfo.thread_id || receiptInfo.thread_id === \"main\") {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":5,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1078,"cache_read_input_tokens":59140,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1078},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bb9fc71c-8640-4602-bdd0-cecb051b7494","uuid":"01ff6253-ae3f-4adc-a0a4-f81d2aab7901"}

function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {","newString":"/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);\n    if (!receiptsForEvent) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }\n    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {\n        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {\n            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {\n                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {\n                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;\n                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n                    if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                        // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                        if (receiptInfo.thread_id === threadId) {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n Foundation C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events);\n}\n\n/**\n * haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);\n    if (!receiptsForEvent) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }\n    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {\n        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {\n            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {\n                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {\n                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;\n                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n                    if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                        // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                        if (receiptInfo.thread_id === threadId) {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                        // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n                        if (!receiptInfo.thread_id || receiptInfo.thread_id === \"main\") {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":169,"oldLines":7,"newStart":169,"newLines":8,"lines":[" export function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {","     const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":156,"oldLines":7,"newStart":156,"newLines":7,"lines":["     }"," ","     for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {","-        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline)) {","+        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {","             // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread","             return true;","         }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

58→ */\n    59→function hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    60→    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n   115→    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n   116→    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return check - check the unimportant ones.\n   124→        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n   125→        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n   126→            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n   127→            // consider it read\n   128→            return false;\n   129→        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId,  132→            return false;\n   133→        } else {\n   134→            // We have events. and none of them are read. 2024 New Vector Ltd.\nCopyright 2015-2023 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);\n    if (!receiptsForEvent) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }\n    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {\n        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {\n            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {\n                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {\n                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;\n                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n                    if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                        // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                        if (receiptInfo.thread_id === threadId) {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                        // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n                        if (!receiptInfo.thread_id || receiptInfo.thread_id === \"main\") {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","numLines":199,"startLine":1,"totalLines":199}}}

we're looking for\n            if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                if (userReceipt.thread_id === threadId) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n                if (!userReceipt.thread_id || userReceipt.thread_id === \"main\") {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}","originalFile":"/*\nCopyright 2024 New Vector Ltd.\nCopyright 2015-2023 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);\n    if (!receiptsForEvent) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }\n    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {\n        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {\n            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {\n                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {\n                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;\n                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n                    if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                        // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                        if (receiptInfo.thread_id === threadId) {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                        // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n                        if (!receiptInfo.thread_id || receiptInfo.thread_id === \"main\") {\n                            return true;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":60,"oldLines":31,"newStart":60,"newLines":32,"lines":["     // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id","     // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\""," ","-    const receiptsForEvent = room.getReceiptsForEvent(eventId);","-    if (!receiptsForEvent) {","+    // Access the room's internal receipt storage","+    // This is structured as: { eventId: { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } } }","+    const roomReceipts = (room as any)._receipts;","+    if (!roomReceipts || !roomReceipts[eventId]) {","         return false;","     }"," ","-    // receiptsForEvent is likely { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } }","-    for (const [receiptType, receiptData] of Object.entries(receiptsForEvent)) {","-        if (receiptData && typeof receiptData === \"object\") {","-            for (const [receiptUserId, receipt] of Object.entries(receiptData)) {","-                if (receiptUserId === userId && receipt && typeof receipt === \"object\") {","-                    const receiptInfo = receipt as any;","-                    // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for","-                    if (threadId !== undefined) {","-                        // We're checking a thread - {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"# Simplify: Code Review and Cleanup\n\nReview all changed files for reuse, quality, and efficiency. Fix any issues found.\n\n## Phase 1: Identify Changes\n\nRun `git diff` (or `git diff HEAD` if there are staged changes) to see what changed. If there are no git changes, review the most recently modified files that the user mentioned or that you edited earlier in this conversation.\n\n## Phase 2: Launch Three Review Agents in Parallel\n\nUse the Agent tool to launch all three agents concurrently in a single message. Pass each agent the full diff so it has the complete context.\n\n### Agent 1: Code Reuse Review\n\nFor each change:\n\n1. **Search for existing utilities and helpers** that could replace newly written code. Use Grep to find similar patterns elsewhere in the codebase — common locations are utility directories, shared modules, and files adjacent to the changed ones.\n2. **Flag any new function that duplicates existing functionality.** Suggest the existing function to use instead.\n3. **Flag any inline logic that could use an existing utility** — hand-rolled string manipulation, manual path handling, custom environment checks, ad-hoc type guards, and similar patterns are common candidates.\n\n### Agent 2: Code Quality Review\n\nReview the same changes for hacky patterns:\n\n1. **Redundant state**: state that duplicates existing state, cached values that could be derived, observers/effects that could be direct calls\n2. **Parameter sprawl**: adding new parameters to a function instead of generalizing or restructuring existing ones\n3. **Copy-paste with slight variation**: near-duplicate code blocks that should be unified with a shared abstraction\n4. **Leaky abstractions**: exposing internal details that should be encapsulated, or breaking existing abstraction boundaries\n5. **Stringly-typed code**: using raw strings where constants, enums (string unions), or branded types already exist in the codebase\n\n### Agent 3: Efficiency Review\n\nReview the same changes for efficiency:\n\n1. **Unnecessary work**: redundant computations, repeated file reads, duplicate network/API calls, N+1 patterns\n2. **Missed concurrency**: independent operations run sequentially when they could run in parallel\n3. **Hot-path bloat**: new blocking work added to startup or per-request/per-render hot paths\n4. **Unnecessary existence checks**: pre-checking file/resource existence before operating (TOCTOU anti-pattern) — operate directly and handle the error\n5. **Memory**: unbounded data structures, missing cleanup, event listener leaks\n6. **Overly broad operations**: reading entire files when only a portion is needed, loading all items when filtering for one\n\n## Phase 3: Fix Issues\n\nWait for all three agents to complete. Aggregate their findings and fix each issue directly. If a finding is a false positive or not worth addressing, note it and move on — do not argue with the finding, just skip it.\n\nWhen done, briefly summarize what was fixed (or confirm the code was already clean).\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bb9fc71c-8640-4602-bdd0-cecb051b7494","uuid":"ce3b004a-cf62-4ca7-bf87-e808723f7ff2","isSynthetic":true}

messages.\n   112→    return false;\n   113→}\n   114→\n   115→function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n   116→    // The room 130→        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n   131→            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n   132→            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n   133→            return false;\n   134→        } else {\n   135→            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n   136→            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n   137→            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n   138→            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n   139→                roomId: room.roomId,\n   140→                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n   141→            });\n   142→            return true;\n   143→        }\n   144→    }\n   145→}\n   146→\n   147→/**\n   148→ * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n   149→ * @param room The room to check\n   150→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n   151→ */\n   152→export function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n   153→    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n   154→        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n   155→        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n   156→        return false;\n   157→    }\n   158→\n   159→    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n   160→        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n   161→            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n   162→            return true;\n   163→        }\n   164→    }\n   165→\n   166→    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n   167→    return false;\n   168→}\n   169→\n   170→export function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n   171→    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n   172→    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n   173→    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n   174→    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n   175→}\n   176→\n   177→/**\n   178→ * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n   179→ * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n   180→ *\n   181→ * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n   182→ */\n   183→function findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n   184→    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n   185→        const event = timeline[index];\n   186→        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n   187→            return event;\n   188→        }\n   189→    }\n   190→    return null;\n   191→}\n   192→\n   193→/**\n   194→ * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n   195→ * this room unread?\n   196→ */\n   197→function isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n   198→    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n   199→}\n   200→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Vd2jy3Jq58NcH4PvDNj6MF","session_id":"bb9fc71c-8640-4602-bdd0-cecb051b7494","uuid":"a9ff684d-7621-4e83-885a-987b0c63ae07"}

RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n    15→\n    16→/**\n    17→ * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n    18→ * count of unread messages\n    19→ *\n    20→ * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n    21→ * @param {Object} ev The event\n    22→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n    23→ */\n    24→export function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    25→    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n    26→        return false;\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    switch (ev.getType()) {\n    30→        case EventType.RoomMember:\n    31→        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n    32→        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n    33→        case EventType.CallHangup:\n    34→        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n    35→        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n    36→        case M_BEACON.name:\n    37→        case M_BEACON.altName:\n    38→            return false;\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    42→    try {\n    43→        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    44→    } catch (e) {\n    45→        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n    46→        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    47→    }\n    48→}\n    49→\n    50→/**\n    51→ * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n    52→ *\n    53→ * @param room The room containing the event\n    54→ * @param userId The user ID to check\n    55→ * @param eventId The event ID to check\n    56→ * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n    57→ * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n    58→ */\n    59→function hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    60→    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    61→    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n    62→\n    63→    // Access the room's internal receipt storage\n    64→    // This is structured as: { eventId: { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } } }\n    65→    const roomReceipts = (room as any)._receipts;\n    66→    if (!roomReceipts || !roomReceipts[eventId]) {\n    67→        return false;\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    const receiptsByType = roomReceipts[eventId];\n    71→\n    72→    // Check all receipt types (m.read, m.read.private, etc.)\n    73→    for (const receiptType in receiptsByType) {\n    74→        const receiptData = receiptsByType[receiptType];\n    75→        if (receiptData && receiptData[userId]) {\n    76→            const userReceipt = receiptData[userId];\n    77→            // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n    78→            if (threadId !== undefined) {\n    79→                // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n    80→                if (userReceipt.thread_id === threadId) {\n    81→                    return true;\n    82→                }\n    83→            } else {\n    84→                // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n    85→                // or should have thread_id = \"main\"\n    86→                if (!userReceipt.thread_id || userReceipt.thread_id === \"main\") {\n    87→                    return true;\n    88→                }\n    89→            }\n    90→        }\n    91→    }\n    92→\n    93→    return false;\n    94→}\n    95→\n    96→export function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    97→    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    98→    if (includeThreads) {\n    99→        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n   100→            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n   101→        }\n   102→    }\n   103→\n   104→    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n   105→        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n   106→            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n   107→            return true;\n   108→        }\n   109→    }\n   110→\n   111→    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n   112→    return false;\n   113→}\n   114→\n   115→function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>, threadId?: string): boolean {\n   116→    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n   117→    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n   118→\n   119→    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n   120→    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n   121→    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n   122→        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n   123→    } else {\n   124→        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n   125→        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n   126→        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n   127→            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n   128→            // consider it read\n   129→            return false;\n   130→        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n   131→            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n   132→            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n   133→            return false;\n   134→        } else {\n   135→            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n   136→            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n   137→            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n   138→            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n   139→                roomId: room.roomId,\n   140→                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n   141→            });\n   142→            return true;\n   143→        }\n   144→    }\n   145→}\n   146→\n   147→/**\n   148→ * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n   149→ * @param room The room to check\n   150→ * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n   151→ */\n   152→export function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n   153→    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n   154→        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n   155→        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n   156→        return false;\n   157→    }\n   158→\n   159→    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n   160→        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n   161→            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n   162→            return true;\n   163→        }\n   164→    }\n   165→\n   166→    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n   167→    return false;\n   168→}\n   169→\n   170→export function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n   171→    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n   172→    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n   173→    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n   174→    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n   175→}\n   176→\n   177→/**\n   178→ * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n   179→ * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n   180→ *\n   181→ * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n   182→ */\n   183→function findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n   184→    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n   185→        const event = timeline[index];\n   186→        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n   187→            return event;\n   188→        }\n   189→    }\n   190→    return null;\n   191→}\n   192→\n   193→/**\n   194→ * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n   195→ * this room unread?\n   196→ */\n   197→function isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n   198→    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n   199→}\n   200→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01R1x36wHrBSWG1kiyPAS8dM","session_id":"bb9fc71c-8640-4602-bdd0-cecb051b7494","uuid":"3a348549-6ab1-4a09-8196-f51dee6b8ed1"}
