thread ID in read receipts\nconst MAIN_THREAD_ID = \"main\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * Note: This function accesses the private `_receipts` property because the matrix-js-sdk\n * does not provide a public API that combines user receipt checking with thread-scoped filtering.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    // Access the room's internal receipt storage\n    // This is structured as: { eventId: { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } } }\n    const roomReceipts = (room as any)._receipts;\n    if (!roomReceipts || !roomReceipts[eventId]) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    const receiptsByType = roomReceipts[eventId];\n\n    // Check all supported receipt types (m.read, m.read.private, etc.)\n    for (const receiptType in receiptsByType) {\n        // Only consider supported receipt types\n        if (!isSupportedReceiptType(receiptType)) {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        const receiptData = receiptsByType[receiptType];\n        if (receiptData && receiptData[userId]) {\n            const userReceipt = receiptData[userId];\n            // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n            if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                if (userReceipt.thread_id === threadId) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                // or should have thread_id = MAIN_THREAD_ID\n                if (!userReceipt.thread_id || userReceipt.thread_id === MAIN_THREAD_ID) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    // Cache userId to avoid repeated lookups in the hot path\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(\n    room: Room,\n    myUserId: string,\n    timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>,\n    threadId?: string,\n): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // Cache userId to avoid repeated lookups in the hot path\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, events, threadId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":192,"oldLines":7,"newStart":192,"newLines":8,"lines":["     const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n   126→    return false;\n   127→}\n   128→\n   129→function doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(\n   130→    room: Room,\n   131→    myUserId: roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n   193→    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n   194→    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n   195→    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n   196→    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, events, threadId);\n   197→}\n   198→\n   199→/**\n   200→ * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n   201→ * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n   202→ *\n   203→ * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n   204→ */\n   205→function findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n   206→    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n   207→        const event = timeline[index];\n   208→        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n   209→            return event;\n   210→        }\n   211→    }\n   212→    return null;\n   213→}\n   214→\n   215→/**\n   216→ * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n   217→ * this room unread?\n   218→ */\n   219→function isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n   220→    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n   221→}\n   222→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code 2024 New Vector Ltd.\nCopyright 2015-2023 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nSPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Element-Commercial\nPlease see LICENSE files in the repository root for full details.\n*/\n\nimport { M_BEACON, type Room, Thread, type MatrixEvent, EventType, type MatrixClient } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\nimport { isSupportedReceiptType } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/utils\";\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n\nimport shouldHideEvent from \"./shouldHideEvent\";\nimport { haveRendererForEvent } from \"./events/EventTileFactory\";\nimport { RoomNotifState, getRoomNotifsState } from \"./RoomNotifs\";\n\n// Constant for the main timeline thread ID in read receipts\nconst MAIN_THREAD_ID = \"main\";\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this event arriving in a room should affect the room's\n * count of unread messages\n *\n * @param client The Matrix Client instance of the logged-in user\n * @param {Object} ev The event\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given event should affect the unread message count\n */\nexport function eventTriggersUnreadCount(client: MatrixClient, ev: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    if (ev.getSender() === client.getSafeUserId()) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    switch (ev.getType()) {\n        case EventType.RoomMember:\n        case EventType.RoomThirdPartyInvite:\n        case EventType.CallAnswer:\n        case EventType.CallHangup:\n        case EventType.RoomCanonicalAlias:\n        case EventType.RoomServerAcl:\n        case M_BEACON.name:\n        case M_BEACON.altName:\n            return false;\n    }\n\n    if (ev.isRedacted()) return false;\n    try {\n        return haveRendererForEvent(ev, client, false /* hidden messages should never trigger unread counts anyways */);\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.warn(\"Error determining if event should trigger unread count\", e);\n        return false; // If we can't determine if the event should trigger an unread count, assume it does not.\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Checks if a user has read a specific event, optionally filtered by thread.\n *\n * Note: This function accesses the private `_receipts` property because the matrix-js-sdk\n * does not provide a public API that combines user receipt checking with thread-scoped filtering.\n *\n * @param room The room containing the event\n * @param userId The user ID to check\n * @param eventId The event ID to check\n * @param threadId Optional thread ID for thread-scoped receipts\n * @returns True if the user has read the event in the appropriate context\n */\nfunction hasUserReadEvent(room: Room, userId: string, eventId: string, threadId?: string): boolean {\n    // For thread timelines, we need to check for receipts with matching thread_id\n    // For the main timeline, we check for receipts without thread_id or with thread_id=\"main\"\n\n    // Access the room's internal receipt storage\n    // This is structured as: { eventId: { receiptType: { userId: { ts, thread_id? } } } }\n    const roomReceipts = (room as any)._receipts;\n    if (!roomReceipts || !roomReceipts[eventId]) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    const receiptsByType = roomReceipts[eventId];\n\n    // Check all supported receipt types (m.read, m.read.private, etc.)\n    for (const receiptType in receiptsByType) {\n        // Only consider supported receipt types\n        if (!isSupportedReceiptType(receiptType)) {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        const receiptData = receiptsByType[receiptType];\n        if (receiptData && receiptData[userId]) {\n            const userReceipt = receiptData[userId];\n            // Check if this receipt matches the thread context we're looking for\n            if (threadId !== undefined) {\n                // We're checking a thread - receipt must have matching thread_id\n                if (userReceipt.thread_id === threadId) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // We're checking the main timeline - receipt should not have thread_id\n                // or should have thread_id = MAIN_THREAD_ID\n                if (!userReceipt.thread_id || userReceipt.thread_id === MAIN_THREAD_ID) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages(room: Room, includeThreads: boolean): boolean {\n    // Cache userId to avoid repeated lookups in the hot path\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    const toCheck: Array<[Room | Thread, string | undefined]> = [[room, undefined]];\n    if (includeThreads) {\n        for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n            toCheck.push([thread, thread.id]);\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (const [withTimeline, threadId] of toCheck) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, withTimeline.timeline, threadId)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room is unread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no timelines were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nfunction doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(\n    room: Room,\n    myUserId: string,\n    timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>,\n    threadId?: string,\n): boolean {\n    // The room is a space, let's ignore it\n    if (room.isSpaceRoom()) return false;\n\n    const latestImportantEventId = findLatestImportantEvent(room.client, timeline)?.getId();\n    if (latestImportantEventId) {\n        return !hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, latestImportantEventId, threadId);\n    } else {\n        // We couldn't find an important event to check - check the unimportant ones.\n        const earliestUnimportantEventId = timeline.at(0)?.getId();\n        if (!earliestUnimportantEventId) {\n            // There are no events in this timeline - it is uninitialised, so we\n            // consider it read\n            return false;\n        } else if (hasUserReadEvent(room, myUserId, earliestUnimportantEventId, threadId)) {\n            // Some of the unimportant events are read, and there are no\n            // important ones after them, so we've read everything.\n            return false;\n        } else {\n            // We have events. and none of them are read.  We must guess that\n            // the timeline is unread, because there could be older unread\n            // important events that we don't have loaded.\n            logger.warn(\"Falling back to unread room because of no read receipt or counting message found\", {\n                roomId: room.roomId,\n                earliestUnimportantEventId: earliestUnimportantEventId,\n            });\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * Returns true if this room has unread threads.\n * @param room The room to check\n * @returns {boolean} True if the given room has unread threads\n */\nexport function doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads(room: Room): boolean {\n    if (getRoomNotifsState(room.client, room.roomId) === RoomNotifState.Mute) {\n        // No unread for muted rooms, nor their threads\n        // NB. This logic duplicated in RoomNotifs.determineUnreadState\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    // Cache userId to avoid repeated lookups in the hot path\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n\n    for (const thread of room.getThreads()) {\n        if (doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, thread.timeline, thread.id)) {\n            // We found an unread, so the room has an unread thread\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we got here then no threads were found with unread messages.\n    return false;\n}\n\nexport function doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages(roomOrThread: Room | Thread): boolean {\n    const room = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.room : roomOrThread;\n    const events = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.timeline : room.getLiveTimeline().getEvents();\n    const threadId = roomOrThread instanceof Thread ? roomOrThread.id : undefined;\n    const myUserId = room.client.getSafeUserId();\n    return doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages(room, myUserId, events, threadId);\n}\n\n/**\n * Look backwards through the timeline and find the last event that is\n * \"important\" in the sense of isImportantEvent.\n *\n * @returns the latest important event, or null if none were found\n */\nfunction findLatestImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, timeline: Array<MatrixEvent>): MatrixEvent | null {\n    for (let index = timeline.length - 1; index >= 0; index--) {\n        const event = timeline[index];\n        if (isImportantEvent(client, event)) {\n            return event;\n        }\n    }\n    return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Given this event does not have a receipt, is it important enough to make\n * this room unread?\n */\nfunction isImportantEvent(client: MatrixClient, event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n    return !shouldHideEvent(event) && eventTriggersUnreadCount(client, event);\n}\n","numLines":222,"startLine":1,"totalLines":222}}}

Here's a summary of what was fixed:\n\n## Summary of Changes to `/workspace/apps/web/src/Unread.ts`\n\n### **Core Implementation - Thread-Scoped Unread Detection**\n\n1. **New `hasUserReadEvent()` helper function** - Checks if a user has read a specific event with support for thread-scoped read receipts:\n   - Handles main timeline receipts (no `thread_id` or `thread_id=\"main\"`)\n   - Handles thread-specific receipts (matching `thread_id` with thread root ID)\n   - Respects the Matrix spec for thread-aware read receipts\n\n2. **Updated `doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages()`** - Now iterates through both main timeline and all threads, passing thread context:\n   - Checks main timeline unread status\n   - Checks each thread individually for unread messages\n   - Room is marked unread if ANY timeline (room or thread) has unread content\n\n3. **Updated `doesTimelineHaveUnreadMessages()`** - Extended to support thread filtering:\n   - Accepts optional `threadId` parameter\n   - Passes thread context to receipt checking\n\n4. **Updated `doesRoomHaveUnreadThreads()` and `doesRoomOrThreadHaveUnreadMessages()`** - Both now pass thread ID information correctly\n\n### **Code Quality Improvements (from review agents)**\n\n✅ **Added `isSupportedReceiptType()` validation** - Now filters receipt types to only process valid Matrix receipt types (m.read, m.read.private, etc.)\n\n✅ **Extracted \"main\" thread ID to constant** - Created `MAIN_THREAD_ID = \"main\"` constant to avoid magic strings and improve maintainability\n\n✅ **Added documentation for private API access** - Explains why `_receipts` is accessed directly (no public SDK API combines user receipt checking with thread filtering)\n\n### **Performance Optimizations (from efficiency review)**\n\n✅ **Cached `myUserId` to avoid repeated lookups** - The hot path (`doesRoomHaveUnreadMessages`) now caches the user ID once instead of fetching it 6+ times per room check.
